entry.title: [BE] Mamdani Lied: He Won't Arrest Netanyahu
entry.summary: Zohran Mamdani was lying when he said he would arrest Benjamin Netanyahu. Everyone with a brain knew he was lying. Now that Netanyahu is abou to visit New York City, he's trying to spin having lied in a positive way and his livestock-like supporters are of course lapping it up. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
Zohran Mamdani was lying when he said he would arrest Benjamin Netanyahu. Everyone with a brain knew he was lying. Now that Netanyahu is abou to visit New York City, he's trying to spin having lied in a positive way and his livestock-like supporters are of course lapping it up.

entry.title: [BE] These People Are Cattle
entry.summary: There is currently a mass psychosis of fucking morons turning Palestine into little more than an empty group identity signifier, which is exemplified by the World Cup and the reaction to it from said morons who somehow turned Argentina into a proxy for Israel to offload their guilt regarding their own country's support of Israel onto. Now they are supporting SPAIN as the bastion of supposedly being pro-Palestine and anti-racist. My god Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
There is currently a mass psychosis of fucking morons turning Palestine into little more than an empty group identity signifier, which is exemplified by the World Cup and the reaction to it from said morons who somehow turned Argentina into a proxy for Israel to offload their guilt regarding their own country's support of Israel onto. Now they are supporting SPAIN as the bastion of supposedly being pro-Palestine and anti-racist. My god

entry.title: [BE] Indigenous Friends of Israel
entry.summary: Israel pays some Indigenous people to support it, and some others do more of their own volition. Some of them aren't even real! Here I talk about this weird phenomenon, where Israel is suddenly very concerned about projecting an image of being "Indigenous" and seeks validation for this, and laugh at it a bit. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
Israel pays some Indigenous people to support it, and some others do more of their own volition. Some of them aren't even real! Here I talk about this weird phenomenon, where Israel is suddenly very concerned about projecting an image of being "Indigenous" and seeks validation for this, and laugh at it a bit.
Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada
Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/
Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join

entry.title: [BE] Anti-AIPAC is NOT Anti-Israel
entry.summary: The new hot liberal Zionist psyop, pioneered by Track AIPAC, is to frame politicians refusing to receive money from AIPAC as being equivalent to them actually being anti-Israel in lieu of their actual policy positions and opinions on Israel meaningfully being anti-Israel. Here I explain how! Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
The new hot liberal Zionist psyop, pioneered by Track AIPAC, is to frame politicians refusing to receive money from AIPAC as being equivalent to them actually being anti-Israel in lieu of their actual policy positions and opinions on Israel meaningfully being anti-Israel. Here I explain how!

entry.title: [BE] Hasan Piker Is a Liberal Zionist (With BadEmpanada Derangement Syndrome)
entry.summary: Hasan decided to go on numerous rants about me this week. During a week where he also did multiple segments and interviews that really exposed him as a liberal Zionist even more than he has been before. In this video I respond to his slander and highlight just bad he's gotten by contrasting his interview with Ro Khanna with Jeremy Scahill's. entry.title: [BE] Internet Decides Paraguay is Racist - But It Actually Did Reverse Yakub
entry.summary: Everyone decided Paraguay, a country they never heard of, was racist due to the world cup. Here I talk about how stupid the logic of this is, and use the opportunity to tell you about an interesting part of Paraguayan history that might paint a different picture. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:

entry.title: [BE] These Argentina History Lies Are Breaking My Brain
entry.summary: With the world cup, 50000 different guys who make unsourced but very confident videos have started making very confident claims about Argentina doing "black genocide". entry.title: [BE] PragerU Is DEAD
entry.summary: The once mighty juggernaut of right-wing YouTube, PragerU, now gets like 5000 views per video when they aren't buying them via YouTube preroll ads. They are so pathetic that they're now making AI generated videos of left-wingers debunking them, because not even Breadtube makes videos on them anymore. In this video I address the end of a LEGEND Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g

entry.title: [BE] Colombia Has Fallen
entry.summary: Abelardo de la Espriella, a fanatical short man who is a puppet of Trump and Netanyahu, won Colombia's presidential election for the right wing. Here I talk about how this mean It's Over for Colombia. entry.title: [BE] Block the Bombs Act Doesn't Block Any Bombs
entry.summary: A full arms embargo on Israel is very popular right now, and politicians have noticed. This has resulted in the 'Block the Bombs' act, H.R.3565, supported by people like Bernie Sanders, AOC, and the DSA - but this bill is not only not an arms embargo, IT ALSO BLOCKS NO BOMBS. It's all a scam to mislead you. Here I explain how. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
A full arms embargo on Israel is very popular right now, and politicians have noticed. This has resulted in the 'Block the Bombs' act, H.R.3565, supported by people like Bernie Sanders, AOC, and the DSA - but this bill is not only not an arms embargo, IT ALSO BLOCKS NO BOMBS. It's all a scam to mislead you. Here I explain how.

entry.title: [BE] Zohran: "I Support Israel"
entry.summary: Zohran Mamdani recently gave an interview where he gave an extremely sneaky answer to the question of whether he thinks Israel has a right to exist as a Jewish state. In this video I dissect this answer, explain how it's made to play both sides by letting the viewer interpret it how they want, and how this sort of rhetoric helps lead people to liberal Zionism. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
Zohran Mamdani recently gave an interview where he gave an extremely sneaky answer to the question of whether he thinks Israel has a right to exist as a Jewish state. In this video I dissect this answer, explain how it's made to play both sides by letting the viewer interpret it how they want, and how this sort of rhetoric helps lead people to liberal Zionism.

entry.title: [BE] Ethan's Klein's Stalkers Are Now Slandering Me!
entry.summary: HAVE MY CHICKENS COME HOME TO ROOST?! The pathetic Ethan Klein / h3 snark subreddit /r/leftoversh3 has taken to slandering me with insane lies because I criticize Hasan Piker for having shit politics. Here I respond to their bullshit lies where they accuse me of stealing LOTS OF MONEY, and also warn you all about where these ridiculous obsessive communities like this lead you: to a self-lobotomy. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
HAVE MY CHICKENS COME HOME TO ROOST?! The pathetic Ethan Klein / h3 snark subreddit /r/leftoversh3 has taken to slandering me with insane lies because I criticize Hasan Piker for having shit politics. Here I respond to their bullshit lies where they accuse me of stealing LOTS OF MONEY, and also warn you all about where these ridiculous obsessive communities like this lead you: to a self-lobotomy.

entry.title: [BE] Response to Slander by Hasan Piker
entry.summary: Hasan Piker told absolutely disgusting lies about me on his stream and did so very intentionally, pretending that I was streaming with Destiny. He spread this lie to hundreds of thousands of people. Here I respond to his lies, refute them, and make him look like a total dumbass for about the 500th time. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
Hasan Piker told absolutely disgusting lies about me on his stream and did so very intentionally, pretending that I was streaming with Destiny. He spread this lie to hundreds of thousands of people.
Here I respond to his lies, refute them, and make him look like a total dumbass for about the 500th time.

entry.title: [BE] This Man's Existence Refutes White Supremacy
entry.summary: Asmongold, who is 48 years old, decided to call for the genocide of Arabs again - seemingly forgetting that he has not showered in 3 months. entry.title: [BE] Zionist Propaganda is DEAD - Liberal Zionism Is New Priority
entry.summary: In this video I explain how the old main style of open Zionist propaganda is totally dead due to the Gaza Genocide, and your new focus as an anti-Zionist should be more subtle and sneaky liberal Zionism.
